meanings.example: I am an AML compliance officer.
The report is on my desk.
I am concerned about this transaction.

chunks.example: I am in charge of transaction monitoring.
We are supposed to file STR within 24 hours.
I am about to send the report.
Are you aware of this regulation?
I am willing to take on this case.

pronTip.title: BE 동사 발음 핵심
points: 축약형 자주 사용: I'm, you're, he's, we're
부정: am not = 'm not / is not = isn't / are not = aren't

listening.title: AML 팀 회의 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Preply Business English 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: Who is in charge of this case? Staff: I am. We are supposed to file the report by today. Manager: Are you aware of the new regulation? Staff: Yes, I am about to review it now. Manager: Good. I am willing to help if needed.

blanks.suffix: supposed to file the report by today.
you aware of the new regulation?

examples5.label: 자기소개
examples5.en: I'm a senior compliance officer at a PG company.

examples5.label: 위치·상황
examples5.en: The settlement file is in the shared folder.

examples5.label: 책임
examples5.en: I'm in charge of monitoring high-risk merchants.

examples5.label: 인지
examples5.en: Are you aware of the new STR threshold?

examples5.label: 상태
examples5.en: I'm concerned about this transaction pattern.

writing5.ko: 저는 AML 팀의 시니어 컴플라이언스 담당자입니다.
writing5.en: I am a senior compliance officer in the AML team.

writing5.ko: 그 보고서는 정산팀의 공유 폴더에 있습니다.
writing5.en: The report is in the settlement team's shared folder.
I am in charge of monitoring high-risk merchants.
We are supposed to file STR within 24 hours.
Are you aware of the new regulation?

challenge3sec.en: I'm a compliance officer at a PG company.
I'm in charge of this case.
We are supposed to report immediately.
I'm about to send the email.
I'm concerned about this transaction pattern.
Are you aware of the new regulation?

freewrite.situation: 신입 동료에게 본인의 AML 업무 역할을 영어로 소개하세요. 본인이 어느 부서 소속이고, 무엇을 담당하며, 어떤 책임을 지고 있는지 BE 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: be in charge of, be supposed to, be aware of
freewrite.placeholder: 예: I'm a senior compliance officer in the AML team. I'm in charge of monitoring suspicious transactions...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
신입 교육, 팀 회의, 부서간 협업 — 가장 자주 쓰는 BE 동사 상황!

dialog.text: Welcome to the team! I'm Kellogg, the senior compliance officer.
Hi! Nice to meet you. So you are in charge of training me?
Yes, I am. We are supposed to start with KYC basics today.
How are things going with the new project?
I'm about to finish the first phase. Just a few details left.
Great. Are you aware of the new compliance deadline?
Good morning everyone. Who is leading the AML side?
I am. I'm in charge of monitoring suspicious transactions.
Perfect. We are about to launch a new merchant program. Are you aware of the risk profile?
Yes, I am. I'm willing to review the customer due diligence requirements with your team.
Thanks. We're supposed to align on this by Friday.
No problem. I'll send you the framework today.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국 본사에서 새 컴플라이언스 매니저(Sarah)가 부임했습니다. 처음 미팅에서 본인 역할과 PG사 AML 업무를 영어로 소개하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Sarah, new global compliance manager from headquarters
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi! I'm Sarah, the new global compliance manager. I just arrived this week. Could you tell me a bit about yourself and your role here?

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
외부 컨설턴트, 외국계 가맹점, 보고서 송부 — 격식 갖춘 BE 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Are you available for a call tomorrow at 3 PM?
I'm afraid I'm in another meeting. I'm available at 4 PM.
4 PM works. I'll send the calendar invite.
Hi, the report is attached. I'm willing to discuss any questions.
Thanks! Are you the right person to ask about KYC details?
Yes, I'm in charge of that. Let me know what you need.
Hi, we are about to onboard a new international merchant. Are there specific KYC requirements?
Hi, thanks for reaching out. Yes, there are specific requirements for international merchants.
You are supposed to submit the beneficial owner verification first. We are aware that the process can be complex.
Got it. Are there any documents we should prepare in advance?
I'm willing to send you a checklist. It is the same one we use internally.
Perfect, much appreciated.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국계 컨설팅사에서 한국 PG사 KYC 절차에 대해 문의 이메일이 왔습니다. 정중하게 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: James, consultant at a global advisory firm
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi, I'm James from Anderson Consulting. Our client is considering Korean PG services. Could you briefly explain your KYC process and what documents are typically required?

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
의심거래 보고, KYC, 규제기관 답변, 계좌 동결 — 태호님 핵심 업무!

dialog.text: I'm concerned about this transaction pattern. The amount is unusually high.
Are you sure it's suspicious?
Yes, I am. I'm about to file an STR.
Why are you asking for these documents?
It's part of our customer due diligence. We are supposed to verify all merchants.
Are you in charge of this verification?
We need clarification on case #2024-0815. Are you the lead investigator?
Yes, I am. I'm in charge of this case.
What was the trigger for the STR filing?
There were multiple red flags. The merchant is supposed to operate in retail, but transaction patterns are inconsistent.
Are you aware of any cross-border activities?
Yes, we are. We are about to share that data with you.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU(금융정보분석원)에서 영어로 의심거래 보고 케이스에 대한 추가 질문이 왔습니다. 케이스 매니저로서 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Good morning. We're following up on the STR you filed last week — case reference 2026-0419. Can you walk me through what initially triggered your suspicion?

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
컨퍼런스 네트워킹, 점심 미팅, 자기소개 — 부드러운 BE 동사!

dialog.text: Hi, I'm Mark from Singapore. What do you do?
Nice to meet you! I'm an AML compliance officer at a PG company in Korea.
Oh interesting! Are you here for the ACAMS conference?
How was your trip?
It was great, thanks. I'm a bit jet-lagged but I'm doing fine.
Are you ready for tomorrow's presentation?
So tell me about your work in Korea. I'm curious about the AML scene there.
Sure! I'm in charge of transaction monitoring at a major PG company.
The Korean market is unique. We are supposed to comply with both local FIU rules and international standards.
Are you aware of the recent FATF mutual evaluation report?
Yes, I am. I was about to bring that up actually. Korea is making good progress.
That's great to hear. Are you willing to share insights when you have time?

rolePlay.scenario: 국제 AML 컨퍼런스(ACAMS)에서 옆자리에 앉은 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 담당자가 말을 겁니다. 자연스럽게 네트워킹하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Lisa, AML analyst from a Singaporean bank
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hey! Mind if I sit here? I noticed your name tag — you're from Korea, right? I'm Lisa, AML analyst at DBS Singapore. How are you finding the conference so far?

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
날씨, 가족, 주말, 음식 — 가장 기본적인 BE 동사 친숙해지기!

dialog.text: Are you free this Saturday?
I'm not sure yet. I'm supposed to visit my parents.
Oh got it. Maybe next week then!
You look tired. Are you okay?
I'm a bit exhausted. I'm about to take a break.
Take care! I'm willing to help if you need anything.
How's your family doing?
They're great, thanks for asking. We're about to plan a family trip.
Oh nice! Where are you thinking?
I'm not sure yet. My parents are aware of a few options. Maybe Jeju Island.
Jeju is amazing! Are you willing to share photos when you go?
Of course! I'll send some when we're there.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국에서 온 친구와 한국에서 첫 만남입니다. 일상적인 자기소개와 한국 생활에 대해 자연스럽게 대화하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Emma, an exchange student from Australia
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi! I'm Emma. I just moved to Seoul last month for grad school. Are you from Seoul originally? I'm still figuring out everything here!
